name: Italian Brainrot
description: Italian Brainrot single-character meme video — full-frame AI-generated character in an absurd scenario with Italian-gibberish voiceover. 8-25s, 9:16, TikTok-native. Distinct from the split-screen `brainrot-ai-meme` format: here the CHARACTER is the entire show (Tralalero Tralala, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Ballerina Cappuccina, etc.), not a narration over gameplay. The canonical character roster lives in the `pool/italian-brainrot-characters` pool of the ralphy-assets companion repo (33 characters, mirrored from brainrot.cyou). Pull one as image-to-image reference, or generate from descriptor. AI-disclosure overlay mandatory.
referenceNotes: User reference NOT required — canonical character refs live in the ralphy-assets pool `italian-brainrot-characters` and are pulled on demand. Use `ralphy assets pull-pool italian-brainrot-characters/<slug> --install <project>` to drop the canonical hero image into the project for image-to-image generation. If the user names a character not in the pool, propose adding it to the pool first (Phase 0: enrich the pool), don't improvise from scratch — the canonical visual identity is half the format.

italian-brainrot-characters.description: All 33 canonical Italian Brainrot characters. Pull as image-to-image reference for character regeneration in new contexts.

constants.structure: 0-2s character entrance (HOOK) → 2-15s absurd action → 15-22s catchphrase repeat (LOOP) → 22-25s payoff/cut
constants.musicDefault: off (gibberish VO is the audio bed)

variationAxes: character pick (33 in the pool — see characters.md)
scenario context (mundane action / fight / dance / cooking / podcast / interview)
duration (8s short hit / 15s standard / 25s extended loop)
